slides.title: The Sorting Hat 🎩
slides.content: When you have a variable and want to test it against many exact values, `switch` is cleaner than endless `if-else` chains.

slides.title: Using Switch

quizData.question: Which keyword acts as the 'else' fallback equivalent within a `switch` block?
quizData.explanation: `default:` is executed if none of the cases match.
